code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut total = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 45
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  else
    if in_num
      let v = cur * sign
      if v > 0
        total = total + v
      else if v < 0
        total = total - v
      end
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_num
  let v = cur * sign
  if v > 0
    total = total + v
  else if v < 0
    total = total - v
  end
end
println("r=#{total}")
